content.text: {"title":"Client creates widget record","slug":"client-creates-widget-record","intent":"An API client needs to add widgets through the service API.","story":"The client posts widget details to the widgets endpoint.","expected_behavior":"The API creates the widget and returns the new record.","boundaries":"This story does not cover listing widgets.","auditable_claims":["The create widget route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: POST /api/widgets"],"docs":[]}}
